A whole row of mature European Pears, unsure the specific type, but good eaters and storage pears. Full-size trees, but easily climbable and accessible with picking poles. On public land, in Buckland Park. Way more fruit than ever gets harvested. Access: Publi

A handful (3 or 4) mature fruiting persimmon trees give this park its name. There are a few more smaller persimmon trees around in these woods toward the north end of the park, as well as some nice mature black walnuts that drop their fruit into a grassy field

lots of canes on either side of the trail from about the spot marked to the footbridge over the creek. Easy picking. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
